title: Pack of 3 20mm Solid Brass Padlocks with 9 Keys - Small Locker Padlocks, Solid Brass Body, Mini Luggage, Tool Box, Jewellery Box and Cupboard Padlocks
features: 🔒🔑🔐🔓 3 PADLOCKS - Protect what matters most with our reliable and durable 20mm padlocks. Engineered for strength, security and peace of mind, these padlocks are a great solution for safeguarding your belongings!
🔒🔑🔐🔓 SPARE KEYS - Each individual padlock in this pack comes with three keys meaning you always have at least one key spare in case of loss or theft!
🔒🔑🔐🔓 BEAUTIFUL BRASS FINISH - This padlock with keys has been constructed from solid brass finish meaning the padlock can be used to fasten lockers or suitcases without looking out of place!

🔒🔑🔐🔓 TRIPLE PACK - Each pack includes three padlocks and nine keys, offering convenience and flexibility for multiple locking applications. With a compact 20mm size, these padlocks are great for securing doors, gates, toolboxes, cabinets and even luggage during travel!

🔒🔑🔐🔓 INCLUDED IN THIS PACKAGE - In each package, you will receive a pack of 3 padlocks. Each padlock comes with three keys (9 keys total) with the padlocks measuring approximately 3cm x 2cm (1.18" x 0.78") in size and is a great accessory for keeping your belongings safe
description: Product Description Padlocks with Keys Protect your most valued possessions with our dependable pack of three 20mm brass finish padlocks. Engineered for optimal security and peace of mind, these padlocks are the ideal solution for safeguarding various spaces like luggage, toolbox and cupboard. Made from durable brass these padlocks are designed to endure different conditions and resist tampering, ensuring the safety of your belongings in any setting. Whether you're securing valuables at home or protecting assets in a business environment, you can rely on the sturdy build of our padlocks for top-notch security. Each set contains three padlocks and nine keys, providing convenience and versatility for multiple locking needs. With a compact 20mm size, these padlocks are ideally suited for securing toolboxes and cupboard, cabinets and even luggage while travelling. Tailored for both indoor and outdoor use, our padlocks are made to tackle various situations, from securing garden sheds to ensuring valuables in your luggage are kept safe. Their small size also makes them great for securing luggage and personal items on the move, offering extra peace of mind during your travels. For uncompromised security, choose the reliable and robust pack of 3 20mm iron padlocks with 9 keys, ensuring your belongings are always protected wherever you are! Strong Solid Brass Body Padlocks This pack of three padlocks with nine keys has been manufactured from tough, durable brass, this gives it an elegant look and means it is great for securing your gym locker, toolbox, jewelry box, or cupboard, without looking agricultural and ensures that the padlocks offer versatile protection you can trust!
